# You Down With CNP? Yeah You Know Me!

We really enjoyed our first visit experience at the Card Not Present (CNP) Expo in Orlando! Warm weather, an awesome venue, and incredible…

![Sift Author Logo](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20504%20504'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Sift Trust and Safety Team

May 29, 2015

![black-dot](https://sift.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/black-dot.svg)

![Press-Release-Tile-Image-Color-Pills\_Blue](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201024%20683'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

We really enjoyed our first visit experience at the Card Not Present (CNP) Expo in Orlando! Warm weather, an awesome venue, and incredible company — what more could we ask for? To those of you that we met at our booth, thanks for stopping by!

During the conference, we spoke to many inspiring businesses and attended several interesting talks.The CNP Expo also afforded us the opportunity to present twice, and we were honored to speak in front of and with our peers at the event.

> Good night, #FraudFighters — don’t let the #chargebacks bite. #siftscientist pic.twitter.com/IkG7dyoKww
> 
> — Sift Science (@siftscience) May 19, 2015

Sift CEO Jason Tan gave a demo in the exhibit hall on Tuesday, May 19 covering the basics of machine learning. During this interactive and fast-paced presentation, Jason provided a quick run down on the how, what, and why of machine learning, as well as its applications to fighting fraud. At the end, we raffled off an Amazon Kindle Fire and Fraud Fighter swag kit to a lucky participant! If you want to learn more about machine learning and how it can be used to predict fraud, check out this awesome ebook we’ve made.

On Wednesday, Jason participated in a panel discussion on using big data to fight fraud. The panel touched on various topics, centering on the challenges that machine learning companies face in adapting to ever-changing data sources and how machine learning is being used to catch fraud with unprecedented accuracy. It was a great opportunity to hear from vendors and merchants alike, and I was really impressed by the caliber of speakers on this panel and at the CNP Expo as a whole. You can read more about the big data panel on CNP’s website.

> Thanks #CNPExpo! The #SiftScientist team had a great time talking #bigdata, #fraud, and #machinelearning. pic.twitter.com/VbLLtDpUYQ
> 
> — Sift Science (@siftscience) May 21, 2015

All in all, being a part of the CNP Expo was educational and a lot of fun. These conferences give us the chance to chat with our non-Bay Area customers face-to-face, and growing these connections is what I love about being a Solutions Engineer. If we missed you at the conference or have any questions about the topics that Jason covered, we’d love to talk to you. Visit us at siftscience.com and fill out a sales or support form and we’ll give you a quick reply.
